hero.subtitle: MAIS is a comprehensive modular system for academic administration. Reliable, secure, and fully compliant with all Slovak higher education requirements.

features.title: What MAIS offers
features.subtitle: A comprehensive solution for all areas of academic administration
features.studyAgendaDesc: Complete study management from admission to graduation. Timetables, schedules, enrolment sheets.
features.eApplicationDesc: Online submission of study applications. Applicants can track application status in real time.
features.securityDesc: Compliance with all legal requirements. Audit trail, encryption, backup and data recovery.
features.performanceDesc: The system handles peak loads during enrolment. SLA 99.9% availability during the semester.
features.integrationsDesc: Connection to SIMUS, CVTI, ISSP, financial and library systems. Open API for custom integrations.
features.modularDesc: Deploy only what you need. The system grows with your institution — no unnecessary features.

arch.desc: MAIS is built modularly — each institution selects only the features it actually needs. The system grows with you, without technical debt and without unnecessary code.

partners.title: Institutions using MAIS
partners.subtitle: Join the leading Slovak universities and colleges

cta.title: Interested in MAIS for your institution?
cta.subtitle: Contact us for a demo and a personalised deployment offer.

footer.tagline: Modular academic information system by ITernal s.r.o.

schools.title: Schools using MAIS
schools.subtitle: Find your institution and access the system
schools.studentTitle: Can't log in or looking for your e-application?
schools.studentDesc: Complete list of institutions with direct contacts to study departments and links to e-applications.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: This section is being prepared
support.loginIssue: Unable to log in to MAIS
support.findSchoolDesc: Find your school and get help directly for your system. Each institution has its own IT helpdesk with contact for students and applicants.
support.contactCentralDesc: If your institution is in the process of deployment, or you need general help with the system, write to us.

institutions.title: For institutions
institutions.subtitle: This section is being prepared
institutions.heroKicker: For rectors, bursars and IT directors
institutions.heroSubtitle: A modular system that grows with your institution.
institutions.whyTitle: Three reasons MAIS will win you over
institutions.reason1Desc: We don't sell off-the-shelf software. We tailor MAIS to the specific needs of each institution — from admission workflows to integration with your existing systems.
institutions.reason2Desc: Deploy only the modules you need. The system scales as your school grows.
institutions.reason3Desc: Full compliance with MŠVVaŠ SR requirements, the Bologna Process and GDPR.
institutions.bentoTitle: A complete ecosystem for academic administration
institutions.bentoSubtitle: From admission through study to archiving — in one system.
institutions.agendaDesc: Study management, timetables, exams, enrolment sheets, schedules. Everything a study department needs.
institutions.eappDesc: Online applications, status tracking, automated notifications. Applicants see everything in real time.
institutions.ctaDesc: Contact us for a free consultation and system demo. We respond within 24 hours.
